title: Dungeons Lily Pads
description: Adds the lily pad types found in Minecraft Dungeons.
body:
![About](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/19d332cdab77737cd016fd7c1ae13efef260cbc7_0.webp)

**Dungeons Lily Pads** adds 4 lily pad variants that are found in the soggy swamp from Minecraft Dungeons. The color pallet has been modified to better fit in the game. The heights of the models have also been adjusted to prevent collision glitches.
